sub_pixel_system.notes: No sub-pixel system data documented in sources

special_mechanics.name: Rocket Propeller Flight
special_mechanics.description: All three playable characters (TwinBee, WinBee, GwinBee) can temporarily fly in eight directions by propelling via a rocket pack that must be charged

character_variants.GwinBee: slowest propeller charge, fastest punch charge

special_mechanics.name: Punch Wave Attack
special_mechanics.description: Characters can charge their punch to unleash a punch wave attack; charging time varies by character

tier_notes: Tier 2: Game is playable with documented mechanics but no quantitative physics values (gravity, velocities, acceleration) are available in sources. Only qualitative descriptions of character abilities and charging mechanics documented. Movement characterized through gameplay description rather than numerical parameters.
sources_used: The Cutting Room Floor - Pop'n TwinBee: Rainbow Bell Adventures
Wikipedia - Pop'n TwinBee: Rainbow Bell Adventures
